expected_path_note: government_level_check=No (contracts solely with city/regional authorities) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 08 – Municipal Roadworks Contractor Uzbekistan Regional Only
activities: Rustam Yusupov owns a road-repair company in Samarkand. All of the company's contracts, as listed in the file, are with the Samarkand city administration and the surrounding regional authority: resurfacing municipal streets, repairing local bridges and maintaining district roads. The file explicitly notes that the company has never held a contract with a national ministry and does not bid for them; national tenders are handled by larger state-linked firms.
origin_of_assets: Profits of the municipal roadworks business.
